title: Glazed Earthy Scottish Raisins Pudding
description: A comforting, earthy pudding filled with raisins and figs, finished with a light glaze, perfect for a Scottish-inspired dessert.
instructions: Combine rolled oats, raisins, chopped figs, cinnamon, nutmeg, and sea salt in a large bowl and mix well.
Stir in unsweetened applesauce, unsweetened almond milk, vanilla extract, and coconut flour until a thick batter forms.
Pour the batter into a greased 20x20 cm pan.
Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until the top is golden and a toothpick comes out clean.
While the pudding bakes, whisk erythritol, almond milk for glaze, and a pinch of sea salt in a small saucepan over low heat until smooth.
When the pudding is done, remove it from the oven and pour the glaze evenly over the hot surface.
Let the pudding cool for 10 minutes before slicing into squares.
Serve warm or at room temperature for a comforting Scottish treat.
